name: F-Zero
description: Nintendo's futuristic racing series focused on high-speed hovercraft racing, technical tracks, and Captain Falcon's sci-fi setting.

eras.title: Mode 7 Origin Era
eras.description: The SNES original establishes the high-speed futuristic racing identity.

eras.title: 3D Speed Era
eras.description: Nintendo 64, GameCube, arcade, and GBA entries expand the series into faster, more technical racing.
